ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Adani Enterprises Limited issued a minor correction regarding a typographical error in the date of a previously submitted media release concerning the "AdaniDioxycle Partnership to Advance Low-Carbon Chemical Manufacturing." The correct date is July 10, 2026, instead of July 9, 2026, with all other contents of the announcement remaining unchanged. This clerical correction has no material financial or operational impact and does not indicate any red flags.
